title: Creating a Chatbot for Mental Health Support
scenario: Design a conversational chatbot that provides mental health support to users, including mood tracking, emotional support, and resources for crisis situations. The target LLM output should be a detailed design document outlining the chatbot's capabilities, dialogue flow, and potential FAQs. Ensure the document is 2-3 pages in length and includes relevant statistics and research.
constraints: Should include a minimum of 3 statistics or research findings
Should include a diagram of the user journey

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the design document incorporate evidence-based practices for mental health support?
Are the included statistics and research findings relevant to mental health support?
Is the user journey diagram clear and easy to understand?
Are the FAQs relevant to mental health support?
